titleStmt.title: SII 9.192: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 192. (A.R. No. 98 of 1904.) ON THE 14TH SLAB SET UP ON THE SOUTH SIDE OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 39, Jaya, Phālguṇa, puṇṇame, Sōmavāra, Sōma-grahaṇa, corresponding to A.D. 1115 February 10, Wednesday (not Monday), when there was a lunar eclipse. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and states that, while Tribhuvanamalla-Pāṇḍyadēva was ruling over Noḷambavāḍi thirty-two thousand the Daṇḍanāyaka Tikkabhaṭṭa made a gift of the toll-revenue at the rate of two hāgas on every load of merchandise instead of one hāga as before, for feeding five Brāhmans in the satra every day, the balance, if any, being utilised for the repairs of the tank. Besides this, a grant of two paṇas per month, for offerings in the Brahma-Jinālaya, was made in the presence of Śivaśakti-Paṇḍita. The gift was made into the hands of Śivamayya.

It also registers another gift made in Śaka 1020, Īśvara, Āshāḍha, amāvāsye Bṛihaspativāra, Sūrya-grahaṇa. The date is irregular in many respects. The donor was the same Tikaṇayya-Daṇḍanāyaka. He is said to have made a gift of 200 kammas of wet land for the service of the god Vīrakēśavadēva; and the Mahājanas of the village made a gift of a garden of 60 kammas to the Purāṇa-reader Īśvarabhaṭṭōpādhyāya. Evidently this gift was recorded subsequently.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramē
śvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamutterōttarābhivri
ddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajī
vi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāṁcīpuravarā
dhīśvaraṁ yaduvaṁśāṁbaradyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi nijakuḷakamaḷamā
rttaṇḍaṁ paricchēdigaṇḍaṁ rājigacōḷamanōbhaṁgaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvapādā
bjabhriṁgaṁ nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ
tribhuvanamallapāṇḍyadēvarṇnoḷaṁbavāḍi mūvatticcāsiramumaṁ
duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭapratipāḷanaṁ māḍi sukhadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyu
ttamire samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmaṁtādhipa
ti mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ siṣṭēṣṭajanābhīṣṭaphaḷapradāya
kaṁ haracaraṇasarasīruhamadhukaraṁ vinayaratnākaraṁ niyō
gayōgandharaṁ patikāryyadhurandharaṁ catussamayasamuddharaṇaṁ viśvā
mitragōtrapavitraṁ nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīma
nmahāpradhānanaccupannāyadadhiṣṭhāyakaṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ tikkabhaṭṭaru
śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 39 neya jayasaṁvatsarada
phālguṇada puṇname sōmavāra sōmagrahaṇaṁ byatīpātaṁ kūḍidaṁ
du svasti samastavastuguṇasaṁpanna śrīmadurvvara śivama
yyaṁ dānamaṁ paḍeyalu svasti yamaniyamasvādyāyadhyānadhāraṇa
maunānuṣṭhāṇapārāyaṇajapasamādhivastuguṇasaṁ
pannarappa śrīmatu hariścaṁdradattiyagrahāraṁ bāḷguḷi
yūroḍeyapramukhamahājanamayvadiṁba
ru svasti samastavastuguṇasakaḷāgamakuśalarappa śrīmattsiva
śaktipaṇḍitara sannidhānadoḷ śrīsvayaṁbhukalidēvasvāmi
ya dibyaśrīpādadoḷ dhārāpūrbbaka(ṁ)mmāḍi dēvara
grāsanada satradalayvaru niraṁtaramuṇbaṁtāgi mikkudu piri
yakeṟeya kelasakke naḍevaṁtāgiyarasuvēṟiṁge munnannaḍava pāga
mallade mattondu pāgamuṁ lāvaṇigeya paṇamuṁ mattaṁ bra
hmajinālayada dēvara nivēdyakke tiṁgaḷiṁge yeraḍu paṇamumaṁ bi
ṭṭanintī dharmmama pratipāḷisidavargge prayāgevāraṇāsiku
rukṣētravarghghyatīrtthadoḷ sāsirvvarvvēdapāragargge sāsira kapileyana
ḷaṁkāra(ṁ)mmāḍiyubhayamukhigoṭṭa phaḷamakkumī dharmamana
ḷidavarā tīrtthasthānadoḷanibaru brāhmaṇaruvananitu kapile
yumanaḷida mahāpātakamakku . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō
harēti vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭiṁ varṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
saṁ dātātsumahatsakhyaṁ duḥkhamanyatra pālanaṁ dānaṁ vā
pālanaṁ vēti dānāśśrēyōnupālanātu . svasti śrī
matsakavarṣada 1020 neya Īśvara saṁvatsarada Āṣāḍhadamāse brihaspativāra
sūryyagrahaṇa vyatīpāta kūḍida puṇyadinadoḷu
śrīvīrakēśavadēvarige tikaṇayyadaṁṇāyakaru dēvaraṁgabhōgaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ moppeyakaṭṭada
modalēriya gadde ka 200 ciṁdeyageṟeya paḍuvaṇa kōḍiya maṇalakeyi matta 1
śrīvīrakēśavadēvarige sulihalla nārasiṁhadēvanu Aṁgabhōgaraṁgabhōgakke koṭṭa maṇalakeyi ciṁ
ḍeyageṟeya paḍuvaṇa kōḍiyiṁ baḍagalu matta 1 © svasti śrīmatu bāguḷiya mahā
janamayvadiṁbaru purāṇada Īśvarabhaṭṭōpādhyāyarige sōvanāyaka koṭṭa
kaṭṭada keṟeya keḷagaṇa tōṭa kaṁma 60 ma śrīkalidēvara brahmapurigaḷā
gi śrīmānyavāgi salisuvaru .
Digital edition of SII 9.192 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
